entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A cool season food legume (Cicer arietinum L.) cultivated in arid and semi-arid regions

entities.name: ARID AND SEMI-ARID REGIONS
entities.description: Environmental conditions where chickpea is typically cultivated

entities.name: SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Simple sequence repeat or microsatellite molecular markers

entities.name: BAC-END SEQUENCES
entities.description: Sequences from the ends of bacterial artificial chromosomes used to identify SSRs

entities.name: DART MARKERS
entities.description: Markers developed using diversity arrays technology

entities.name: GENETIC MAP
entities.description: A comprehensive map of marker loci used to determine gene positions on chromosomes

entities.name: RIL POPULATION
entities.description: Recombinant inbred line population used for genetic mapping

entities.name: ICC 4958
entities.description: A chickpea genotype used as a parent in the RIL mapping population

entities.name: PI 489777
entities.description: A Cicer reticulatum genotype used as a parent in the RIL mapping population

entities.name: BAC-LIBRARY
entities.description: A collection of bacterial artificial chromosome clones used to generate BESs

entities.name: LINKAGE GROUPS
entities.description: Groups of markers that are inherited together on the same chromosome

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The total number of genetic characteristics in the genetic makeup of a species

entities.name: GENETIC MAPPING
entities.description: The process of determining the relative locations of genes or markers on a chromosome

entities.name: MOLECULAR BREEDING
entities.description: The use of molecular markers to assist in the selection of desired traits in crops

entities.name: PHYSICAL MAP
entities.description: A map showing the actual physical distance between markers on a chromosome

entities.name: MAP-BASED CLONING
entities.description: A technique used to isolate a gene based on its position on a genetic map

entities.name: COMPARATIVE GENOME EVOLUTION STUDIES
entities.description: Studies comparing the genomes of different species to understand evolutionary relationships

entities.name: LEGUMES
entities.description: A family of plants including chickpea
